articles.title: 'Forced acid down his throat': Parents kill jobless son over repeated drunken brawls
articles.summary: A shocking incident has emerged from Rajkot where a young man was allegedly murdered by his parents. Authorities arrested the couple after a forensic postmortem revealed strangulation marks, contradicting the family's claim of suicide by acid consumption.

articles.title: JNCU declares final semester undergraduate and postgraduate results at jncu.in; download here
articles.summary: The Jananayak Chandrashekhar University has declared final semester undergraduate and postgraduate results online for multiple programmes including NEP courses. Students can download provisional marksheets using roll numbers from the official portal.

articles.title: SSB HC ministerial admit card 2026 out for CBT exam on 7 July; download hall ticket here
articles.summary: SSB HC Ministerial 2020 admit card 2026 has been released by Sashastra Seema Bal for Computer Based Test scheduled on 07 July 2026. Candidates can download hall ticket from official recruitment portal using login credentials.
